title: calamus asperrimus
intro: Calamus asperrimus, also known as Acorus calamus, is a perennial plant native to Asia and North America, characterized by its fragrant roots and rhizomes. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Calamus asperrimus include relief from digestive issues, such as nausea and bloating, as well as its potential to reduce stress and anxiety. Herbal preparations of Calamus asperrimus often include dried roots and rhizomes, which can be used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions.
